column1: Key religious systems: Paganism, Roman polytheism, Christianity (Catholic, Orthodox, Protestant), Islam (during Ottoman rule), Judaism
Notable royal lines: Árpád dynasty (Hungary), Habsburg dynasty (Austria), Nemanjić dynasty (Serbia), Basarab dynasty (Wallachia)
This timeline highlights the complex interplay of cultures, empires, and nations that have shaped the Danube region over millennia, from prehistoric settlements to modern European integration13468.
